answer: The top 5 ZIP codes for permit clustering in the last 30 days are 78744 with 388 permits, 78745 with 293 permits, 78704 with 249 permits, 78747 with 231 permits, and 78703 with 228 permits. These areas saw the highest concentration of issued construction permits during this period.
